Push-back Procedures

Phraseology
CALLSIGN, push-back approved, facing DIRECTION.
Directions
Apron Type Facing Remarks

Taxi Out Procedures

Phraseology
CALLSIGN, taxi via taxiway CHARLIE to holding point CHARLIE SEVEN.

Taxi In Procedures

Phraseology
CALLSIGN, welcome to Dakar. Taxi to STAND ALPHA SEVEN via taxiway CHARLIE, ALPHA THREE.

GOOY Leopold Sedar Senghor | v0.1
